evals.name: habit-tracker-cold-start
evals.prompt: I'm building a habit tracking app for remote workers. Give me some feature ideas.
evals.expected_output: Ideas grouped by theme (3-5 themes), each with a one-liner rationale and a Quick Win / Big Bet tag. 10-20 ideas total.

evals.name: invoicing-client-features
evals.prompt: We have a basic invoicing tool for freelancers — it handles creating invoices and tracking payment status. What features are we missing around client relationships?
evals.expected_output: Ideas grouped by theme, focused on client relationship features, each with rationale and Quick Win / Big Bet tag.

evals.name: meeting-cost-what-else
evals.prompt: We've built the core of a meeting cost calculator — it tracks time in meetings and shows you the dollar cost. What else could we add to make it more useful?
evals.expected_output: Ideas grouped by theme, building on the meeting cost concept, each with rationale and Quick Win / Big Bet tag.
